articles.title: Jayson Tatum won’t play in Celtics’ penultimate regular season matchup
articles.description:
Jaylen Brown was listed questionable as he manages his left Achilles tendinitis, but he will be available.

The post Jayson Tatum won’t play in Celtics’ penultimate regular season matchup appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Jayson Tatum will miss the Celtics' April 10 matchup against the Pelicans.
Jaylen Brown, managing left Achilles tendinitis, is confirmed to play.
Tatum's absence may affect the Celtics' playoff positioning in the final games.

articles.title: She’s running Boston to honor her daughter’s courage through cancer treatment
articles.description:
"I run this marathon for her journey of bravery, for her future opportunities and for all those that have made this hope possible."

The post She’s running Boston to honor her daughter’s courage through cancer treatment appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Lori Robertson runs the Boston Marathon to honor her daughter’s cancer journey.
She emphasizes her daughter's bravery and future opportunities in her marathon mission.
Robertson's run raises awareness for cancer treatment support in the Boston community.
